parsed.production_notes: The presenter's facial movements and lip-sync are slightly unnatural, indicating an AI avatar. The voice has a synthetic cadence, and the lighting on the face remains perfectly static despite slight head movements.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. She has blonde hair parted in the middle with darker roots, and a distinct mole on her right cheek.
characters.wardrobe: Black sleeveless top with a subtle, shiny grid pattern. White wireless earbuds in both ears.

scenes.setting: Indoors, plain brown background, warm lighting

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman is framed in a close-up shot against a plain, warm brown background. She has blonde hair parted in the middle with darker roots, and a small mole on her right cheek. She is wearing a black sleeveless top with a subtle, shiny grid pattern and white wireless earbuds. The lighting is soft and warm, illuminating her face evenly. She is looking directly at the camera, speaking with a serious and earnest expression. Her head moves slightly as she talks, and she occasionally gestures with her right hand, which briefly enters the bottom right of the frame.

scenes.visual_description: A young woman gives a testimonial directly to the camera. She is framed in a close-up against a plain brown background. White text captions appear at the bottom of the screen, and a blue app logo is visible in the top right corner.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I used to be really nervous in meetings.
Character A says: I was too afraid to speak because my English wasn't good enough and I was afraid of saying something wrong, so I stayed quiet.
Character A says: Then a friend told me about Fluently and I thought, why not try it?
Character A says: I started with just 10 minutes a day.
Character A says: That was easy.
Character A says: And the app helps you practice the kind of English you really need at work, for example, how to speak in meetings or how to share your ideas.
Character A says: After a few weeks, everything changed.
Character A says: Now I can talk in meetings without any fear.
Character A says: I don't have those moments of awkward silence and I don't worry about what other people may think of me.
Character A says: Fluently didn't just help my English, it gave me confidence.
Character A says: So if you ever felt like me, download Fluently.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid dark purple to black gradient background. There are no characters, props, or physical objects present.

scenes.visual_description: A digital end card with a dark purple gradient background. The Fluently app logo, a blue square with white double arrows, is centered. Below it is the text 'Fluently App' and 'AI-power English coach'. A purple 'DOWNLOAD NOW' button is at the bottom.
